primary_questions: Q1: Does archetype spread persist vs book implied probability?
Q2: Does archetype x course structure amplify placement edges?
hypothesis_q1: Certain style archetypes will show positive book_residual (actual > book_implied) even after books have already shaded above DG. The spread across archetypes vs book price will be smaller than vs DG but non-zero for at least one archetype x market combination.
hypothesis_q2: Archetype x course structure interactions will produce larger and more stable placement edges than archetype alone. Specifically: STYLE_01 (bomber) will outperform in high-scoring environments. STYLE_04 (grinder/putter) will outperform in low-scoring environments.
